hyperedges.label: Three Workstreams Connected by Frozen Interface Contracts
11-Step Game Tick System Execution Order
Game SpecKit Planning Artifact Chain (spec→research→data-model→plan→tasks)
Physics Simulation Pipeline: RigidBody + Collider + Baumgarte
Per-Frame Game Systems: game_tick drives enemy_ai, projectile, damage, containment
ECS Entity Lifecycle: Transform + Mesh + EntityMaterial as renderable composition
game_tick Orchestrates All Per-Frame Systems
Shield Health → ShieldSphere VFX Update Pipeline
Weapon Firing: Cursor Ray → Projectile/Laser Spawn
Renderer Pipeline Creation Pattern (magenta fallback)
Texture Store Lifecycle (insert, get, shutdown)
Per-Frame Renderer Pipeline (begin → enqueue → end)
Physics Simulation Pipeline: substep, integrate, resolve
Collision Detection and Response Pipeline
Asset Loading Pipeline: import, hull, upload
engine_tick() Orchestration Pipeline
Mesh Asset Import Pipeline (glTF + OBJ + texture cache)
Physics Fixed-Timestep Substep Loop

nodes.label: Euler Physics (6-DOF, 120Hz substep)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Semi-implicit Euler, brute-force O(N²) broadphase acceptable for ≤600 entities; restitution=1.0 for elastic billiard-ball collisions in zero-g.

nodes.label: Dear ImGui Integration (renderer-owned)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Renderer owns sokol_imgui setup/shutdown; game only emits widget calls to avoid a second context.

nodes.label: Shared Technology Decisions
nodes.contributor: rationale: OpenGL 3.3 chosen after Metal→Vulkan pivot failed due to GPU age constraint. sokol abstraction made backend switch painless.

nodes.label: Material (shader + pipeline + uniforms blob)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Full Material redesign in v1.2 replaced flat fields with pipeline-cache-backed shader handle + generic 256-byte uniforms blob for extensibility.

nodes.label: Engine ECS Components (Transform, RigidBody, Collider, Camera, Light, ConvexCollider, etc.)
nodes.norm_label: engine ecs components (transform, rigidbody, collider, camera, light, convexcollider, etc.)

nodes.label: Engine Scene API (create/destroy entity, add/get/remove component)
nodes.norm_label: engine scene api (create/destroy entity, add/get/remove component)

nodes.label: Engine Physics API (apply_force, apply_impulse, inertia helpers)
nodes.norm_label: engine physics api (apply_force, apply_impulse, inertia helpers)

nodes.label: Shared Type Conventions (column-major, linear colors, handle validity)
nodes.norm_label: shared type conventions (column-major, linear colors, handle validity)

nodes.label: R1: Match State Machine Decision
nodes.contributor: rationale: Separating terminal-display from entity cleanup prevents reading destroyed components during the terminal overlay frame.

nodes.label: R2: Simultaneous Death → Victory Decision
nodes.contributor: rationale: Win condition is enemy_count==0; if objective is met, player succeeded. Rewards aggressive play.

nodes.label: R3: No Collision Damage Threshold
nodes.contributor: rationale: No threshold constant to tune; shield regen masks negligible slow-tap damage.

nodes.label: R5: Game-Local Enemy AI (no E-M5 dependency)
nodes.contributor: rationale: ~20 lines seek+LOS+cooldown; zero upstream dependency; avoids blocking G-M3 on a desirable engine milestone.
nodes.norm_label: r5: game-local enemy ai (no e-m5 dependency)

nodes.label: R6: Laser = Raycast, Plasma = RigidBody Projectile
nodes.contributor: rationale: Maps directly to engine API capabilities; preserves distinct weapon feel (instant-hit vs flying projectile).
nodes.norm_label: r6: laser = raycast, plasma = rigidbody projectile

nodes.label: R8: Spherical Containment as Game-Layer Constraint
nodes.contributor: rationale: Engine only supports AABB colliders; spherical boundary stays game-side. Speed cap prevents floating-point energy growth.
nodes.norm_label: r8: spherical containment as game-layer constraint

nodes.label: Game User Stories (US1: Fly, US2: Combat, US3: HUD/Flow)
nodes.norm_label: game user stories (us1: fly, us2: combat, us3: hud/flow)
